commands.review_summary:
The PR removes dependency registry scan scheduling and scanner code, removes dependency registry signal output from API/docs/CLI fixtures, and leaves stored production schema/cache fields in place for now.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a PR review of an intentional cleanup and security-signal retirement, not a bug report with a failing runtime path.

target.title: Retire dependency registry scans
target.body:
## Summary

- Stop scheduling dependency registry existence scans after skill publish.
- Delete the dependency registry scanner action, parser/cache helper, generated function references, and scanner-specific tests.
- Remove dependency registry signal output from the HTTP API, docs, CLI fixtures, and tests.
- Keep the legacy dependency registry schema fields, cache table, and scan-status index so existing production data remains valid until an approved cleanup runs.
- Remove the old dependency-registry static finding reason code.

No production cleanup command has been run. This PR removes scanner code and public/API output, but it does not delete stored dependency registry data.

## Validation

- `bunx convex codegen`
- `bun run test -- convex/lib/skillPublish.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts packages/clawhub/src/cli/commands/inspect.test.ts --reporter=dot`
  - Root Vitest excludes `packages/clawhub/**`, so this ran the two root test files: 287 tests passed.
- `bun run --cwd packages/clawhub test:src -- src/cli/commands/inspect.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `bun run format:check`
- `bun run lint`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
- `bun run test -- --reporter=dot`
target.author: jesse-merhi
